script.title: Inference Radar — 2026-05-09
script.intro: SGLang's HISA hits 1.65× throughput at 128K context; Blackwell MoE, disagg KV, and spec-decode fixes land across all four repos.

slides.heading: SGLang
bullets: HISA hierarchical sparse indexer for DeepSeek NSA — 1.65× total throughput, 1.70× TTFT at 128K ctx vs NSA baseline (#24672)
mhc_pre split-K reduction folded into big_fuse kernel — 1.30–1.58× on GB300, 1.12–1.25× on B300 (≤512 tokens) (#24775)
HiSparse scheduler: fix admission gate for context_len > max_total_num_tokens in PD setup (#24771)
slides.narration: Three attention and MoE performance landings on SGLang. HISA — Hierarchical Indexed Sparse Attention — replaces the O(L) per-token NSA indexer with a two-stage coarse-then-fine approach, yielding 1.65× throughput and 1.70× TTFT at 128K context. On the MoE side, the mhc_pre kernel now folds its split-K stage-one reduction directly into big_fuse, cutting one kernel launch and hitting 1.30 to 1.58× on GB300. And a HiSparse scheduler fix correctly gates admission for requests longer than max_total_num_tokens in PD-disagg.

slides.heading: SGLang
bullets: DSv4 EAGLE draft out_cache_loc shape mismatch — GSM8K collapses ~0.93→~0.42 without fix (#24750)
EAGLE EagleDraftExtendInput refactor: eliminate hidden_states phase-shift (#24780)
EAGLE accept_tokens moved off EagleDraftInput to method arg (#24735)
Mamba mixed-chunk + extra_buffer accuracy regression fix — MMLU 0.7326→0.8947, AIME25 0.8083→0.8917 at concurrency=16 (#24613)
slides.narration: Four correctness fixes on SGLang's speculative and hybrid-SSM paths. The DeepSeek V4 EAGLE draft backend had an out_cache_loc shape mismatch — with batch size ≥ 2 GSM8K accuracy silently collapsed from 0.93 to 0.42. Two EAGLE refactors clean up data-flow across draft phases. And a critical Mamba regression under mixed-chunk plus extra_buffer mode is resolved: MMLU recovers from 0.73 to 0.89, AIME25 from 0.81 to 0.89.

slides.heading: SGLang
bullets: ZBAL memfabric NPU integration — 30%+ MoE decode speedup, 1.2 GB memory saved on Ascend (#24575)
PD disagg ephemeral port exhaustion fix via keep-alive HTTP sessions (#23445)
DeepEP + Pipeline Parallelism garbled output on NPU fixed via PP proxy all-gather control (#23816)
FP8 Wan2.2-T2V-A14B quant scheme recognition fix on NPU via reverse_param_names_mapping (#24540)
slides.narration: SGLang's distributed and NPU stack gets four fixes. ZBAL — Zero Buffer Acceleration Library — integrates memfabric on Ascend, delivering over 30% MoE decode speedup and saving 1.2 gigabytes. A long-standing ephemeral port exhaustion bug in multi-DP decode is resolved with persistent HTTP sessions. DeepEP combined with pipeline parallelism on NPU no longer produces garbled output. And Wan2.2 W8A8 quant recognition on NPU is corrected.

slides.heading: vLLM
bullets: NGram GPU speculator for MRV2: dense on-GPU token storage, variable-length drafts — 23.9% output throughput, acceptance rate 5.16%→52.64% (#40704)
Eagle3: read norm_before_fc from eagle_config dict for NVIDIA GPT-OSS checkpoints — decode 51.3→67.1 tok/s (+30.8%) on 1×H100 (#42143)
DeepSeek-V4 MTP TP+batch>1 deadlock fix — shared-memory broadcast ring buffer desync (~120 tok/s → 0) (#41404)
DeepGEMM MLA indexer: fix non-contiguous context_lens crash in MTP/spec decode path (#42135)
GDN nested torch.compile removed — prevents CUDA graph capture failure during Triton autotuning (#42070)
slides.narration: Five spec-decode items on vLLM. The N-gram GPU speculator for Model Runner V2 keeps history dense on GPU and enables variable-length drafts, pushing acceptance rate from 5% to 52% and throughput up 24%. Eagle3 was silently dropping its RMSNorm-before-FC on NVIDIA GPT-OSS checkpoints — fixing that config key lifts decode from 51 to 67 tok/s. A DeepSeek V4 MTP deadlock under tensor-parallel batch runs is resolved. A non-contiguous tensor crash in the DeepGEMM MLA indexer is patched. And a nested torch.compile on GDN's rearrange_mixed_qkv is removed to unblock CUDA graph capture.

slides.heading: vLLM
bullets: FP8 online loader: skip bias tensors — fixes garbage output on Qwen2/Qwen2.5 with bias=True (#42141)
GDN Triton KKT kernel: WGMMA operand layout precision bug on Hopper sm_90 — GSM8K 0→0.856 (#42076)
DeepGEMM warmup crash: defer alignment check past FP8 guard for non-Hopper hardware (#42142)
FlashInfer CUTLASS MoE: fix mxfp8 scale swizzling to F8_128x4 after EP all-to-all (#42133)
ModelOpt NVFP4 W4A16 via Marlin FP4 kernel — logprob Δ=0 vs native W4A16 on Qwen3-8B (#41769)
slides.narration: Five quantization fixes on vLLM. The FP8 online loader was silently leaving bias tensors uninitialized, producing garbage on Qwen2 models. A spurious dtype cast in the Triton GDN K-K-T kernel misaligned WGMMA register layout on Hopper, collapsing GSM8K from zero to 0.856 after the fix. DeepGEMM warmup crashed unconditionally on non-Hopper hardware — now gated correctly. MXFP8 activation scales after EP all-to-all weren't being swizzled to CUTLASS F8_128x4 layout. And ModelOpt NVFP4 W4A16 via Marlin FP4 lands with bit-identical logprobs to native W4A16.

slides.heading: vLLM
bullets: NixlConnector DCP (Context Parallelism) support for PD-disagg KV transfer — GSM8K ~0.67 across mixed TP/DCP configs (#38433)
Sparse NCCL weight transfer: (indices, values) in-place patches for online RL — 942 MB dense → 0.16 MB sparse payload (#40096)
NVFP4 FlashInfer all-gather GEMM fusion for AsyncTP — output throughput +4.85% at input_len=4096 TP=4 (#41882)
Feather scheduling policy for prefix-sharing workloads (paper: 2–22× throughput, no reproduced numbers) (#42134)
SIGINT graceful shutdown + /live liveness probe + prctl(PR_SET_PDEATHSIG) for Kubernetes (3 PRs) (#36259, #36258, #34816)
slides.narration: Distributed and ops items on vLLM. The Nixl connector gains Context Parallelism support for prefill-decode disaggregation with mixed TP/DCP topologies. Sparse NCCL weight transfer for online RL shrinks payloads from 942 megabytes to 0.16 megabytes using index-value patches. NVFP4 FlashInfer all-gather GEMM fusion for AsyncTP lands at plus 4.85% throughput at 4K input on TP=4. Feather, a prefix-sharing scheduling policy, is added — paper claims 2 to 22× but no reproduced benchmark numbers. And three PRs wire up SIGINT graceful shutdown, a /live liveness probe, and prctl PDEATHSIG for Kubernetes operators.

slides.heading: TensorRT-LLM
bullets: dsv3_router_gemm hidden_dim=6144 for GLM-5 on Blackwell — prevents SIMT fallback costing ~5.4%/~1 ms per decode iter (#13740)
CUTEDSL MoE backend for Nemotron-H: gated (SwiGLU) and non-gated (ReLU²) activation fusion (#12884)
W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 path in DeepGemmFusedMoE via m_grouped_fp8_fp4_gemm_nt_masked (#13383)
CuTe DSL FP4 paged MQA logits decode kernel for Blackwell SM100 (#13929)
FlashInfer BF16 MoE backend added to fused MoE path (#13689)
slides.narration: Five MoE and precision items on TensorRT-LLM. GLM-5's hidden size of 6144 was falling through to an Ampere SIMT cuBLAS path on Blackwell, costing 5.4% per decode iteration — a new compile-time instantiation in dsv3_router_gemm fixes it. The CuTe DSL MoE backend now covers Nemotron-H with both SwiGLU and ReLU-squared activation modes. W4A8 MXFP4-times-MXFP8 is wired through DeepGemmFusedMoE. A new CuTe DSL FP4 paged MQA logits kernel targets Blackwell SM100. And FlashInfer BF16 joins the fused MoE backend alongside CUTLASS.

slides.heading: TensorRT-LLM
slides.subhead: Disagg KV, ADP deadlocks, multi-thread transfer
bullets: Multi-threaded KV transfer for disagg serving — 19–25% mean/median latency, up to 57% max latency on DeepSeek R1 (#13075)
Disagg KV lifecycle hardening: UAF, broken promises, buffer pool wedges under cancellation (#13713)
ADP TP collective deadlock fix — synced error handling via tp_allgather before tp_gather (#13900, #13902)
MNNVL fabric memory allocation for KV cache manager v1 in disagg serving (#12490)
FP8 dummy weights: skip calibration scalars to prevent attention saturation — top-20 accuracy 14%→94% (8B-FP8) (#13879)
slides.narration: Disaggregated serving gets significant attention on TRT-LLM. Multi-threaded KV transfer cuts mean gen-side latency by 19 to 25% and max latency by up to 57% on DeepSeek R1. A stack of UAF and broken-promise bugs in the KV transfer lifecycle is patched. Two related PRs fix ADP TP collective deadlocks via a synchronized allgather in the error path. MNNVL fabric memory allocation lands for KV cache manager v1. And a critical FP8 dummy weight bug — calibration scalars were being randomized — is fixed, recovering top-20 accuracy from 14% to 94% on the 8B FP8 model.

slides.heading: TensorRT-LLM
slides.subhead: Model support: Kimi-K2.5, NemotronH, DeepSeek V4
bullets: Kimi-K2.5 reasoning parser (kimi_k25, reasoning_at_start=True) + auto-flow for K2/K25/Gemma-4/DSV32/Nemotron-H (#13801)
NemotronH Puzzle: per-layer MoE config + FlashInfer Mamba SSD prefill (head_dim 64/128) (#12731)
DeepSeek V4 MLA dynamic sparse attention kernels with in-place RoPE and KV compression (#13652)
MoEScheduler split + MegaMoEDeepGemm EPLB/multi-chunk on DGX B200/B300 (#13908)
DFlash spec-decode: Qwen3.5 MRoPE + GDN linear-attention buffer resize fixes (#13782)
slides.narration: Model support sweep on TRT-LLM. Kimi-K2.5 gets a reasoning parser that handles its think-at-start chat template, and auto-flow now covers K2, K25, Gemma-4, DeepSeek-V3.2, and Nemotron-H. NemotronH Puzzle lands with per-layer MoE configs and FlashInfer Mamba SSD prefill. DeepSeek V4 MLA gets dynamic sparse attention kernels with in-place RoPE. MegaMoEDeepGemm is refactored into a MoEScheduler abstraction and gains EPLB support on B200 and B300. And DFlash spec-decode is fixed for Qwen3.5's MRoPE and GDN linear-attention paths.

slides.heading: Picks
bullets: D4 · vLLM #40969 · DeepSeek-V4-Flash hangs after ~6 requests with cudagraph_mode=FULL_AND_PI — MLA fp8_ds_mla / DeepseekV4Indexer path implicated; no fix merged yet
D4 · vLLM #42096 · Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B NVFP4 latency regression on GB300 (SM100) — TTFT/throughput drop vs prior build; intersects Blackwell NVFP4 stack changes landing this cycle
slides.narration: Two open issues worth tracking. First, DeepSeek-V4-Flash hangs after roughly six requests when CUDA graph mode is set to FULL_AND_PI — the MLA FP8 indexer path is the prime suspect, difficulty four. Second, Qwen3-VL 235B NVFP4 on GB300 is showing a significant latency regression — this intersects directly with the Blackwell NVFP4 changes landing this cycle, so worth watching for a follow-up fix.

script.outro: That's the stack for May 9th — back tomorrow with the next round of merges.

top_firsts.title: [Bug][DeepSeekV4-MTP] DeepSeekV4MultiTokenPredictorLayer.e_proj/h_proj constructed without prefix=, breaks compressed-tensors quant matching
top_firsts.why: Explicit DeepSeek V4 MTP bug with a concrete two-line fix described; fits the deepseek bucket via both the DeepSeek name and MTP primitive.

top_firsts.title: [CI Failure]:  mi300_1: DeepSeek V2-Lite Prefetch Offload Accuracy (H100-MI300)
top_firsts.why: While this names DeepSeek-V2-Lite, that model is not DeepSeek V3.2/V4, and the issue does not involve MLA, MTP, or shared-expert routing. It is a generic CI accuracy regression for DeepSeek-V2-Lite on ROCm, which does not qualify under the strict deepseek bucket rules (must be V3.2/V4 or explicit MLA/MTP/shared-expert primitives).

top_firsts.title: [Bug]: DeepseekV4Attention crashes with KeyError: scale_fmt on non-canonical DSv4 quantizations
top_firsts.why: Explicitly about DeepSeek V4 attention module; the fix is a one-line .get() with a default, concretely described, touching a single file.

top_firsts.title: [ROCm/MI325X] DeepSeek-V4-Flash: NotImplementedError: mul_cuda not implemented for Float8_e8m0fnu in normalize_e4m3fn_to_e4m3fnuz
top_firsts.why: Issue explicitly names DeepSeek-V4-Flash and the fix is concretely described as a small cast change in one file.

top_firsts.title: [Bug]: Negative CUDA graph memory estimation (-35 GiB) with MTP speculative decoding leads to severe KV cache over-allocation and OOM
top_firsts.why: Issue involves MTP (multi-token prediction) speculative decoding, which is a DeepSeek architectural primitive, causing negative CUDA graph memory estimation on Blackwell GB10 hardware.
evidence_quotes: Enable MTP speculative decoding with num_speculative_tokens: 3

recent_prs.title: Better asserts for warp primitives without temp storage
[Bugfix][HiCache] measure load-back duration with CUDA events
[MUSA] bump torchada version to 0.1.59 and workaround PCG limitation.
[#14225][perf] AutoDeploy MTP + ADP enablement and MoE all-to-all optimization
